title: Goods and services tax/harmonized sales tax (GST/HST) credit - calculation sheet for the July 2024 to June 2025 payments (2023 base year) - Canada.ca
content:
## Goods and services tax/harmonized sales tax (GST/HST) credit - calculation sheet for the July 2024 to June 2025 payments (2023 base year)
PDF (409 kb) version
You can also use the Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) - Child and benefits calculator .
Credit for spouse or common-law partner: ($340)
Credit for eligible dependant: ($340)
Credit for eligible children: ($179 for each child not included on line 3)
4 $ Blank space for dollar value

## Calculation of additional credit Footnote 1
(complete only if line 2 is zero)
Line 5 minus line 6. If the result is negative, enter "0".
Additional credit: Enter $179 or 2% of line 7, whichever is less .
Adjusted family net income: (Family net income minus Universal child care benefit (UCCB) and Registered Disability Savings Plan (RDSP) income plus UCCB and RDSP repayment)
Line 10 minus line 11. If the result is negative, enter "0".
12 $ Blank space for dollar value
All amounts are approximate. Your Notice of Determination will show your actual entitlement for the year.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
